creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think this PR is OBE now.  I removed the IPV6 option from the port and fixed some bugs in the IPv6 MIB implementation: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=26406929ca14b616c3de4242d1a7cde0a57ee521

In particular, the patch for net-snmp isn't needed anymore.  I verified that sysutils/nut still builds.

Please re-open the PR if I missed something.
